title: crotalaria monteiroi
intro: Crotalaria monteiroi is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria monteiroi include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Crotalaria monteiroi is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
